data.content:
[plan-review] Approved.

- Plan respects the user's "we cannot fix what we don't understand"
  constraint: this knot does pure containment (skip dead follow-up,
  emit banner) without auto-recovery.
- Reuses dispatch-pool-resolver's banner machinery — no duplicated
  ANSI / box-drawing.
- Adds a new dispatch-failure kind 'lease_dead' so the schema stays
  honest (vs overloading 'agent' or 'backend').
- Fail-closed on lease-state-fetch failures is consistent with
  CLAUDE.md's "Fail Loudly, Never Silently" rule.
- Hermetic test path is straightforward (inject listLeases stub).
- Out of scope is explicit: does NOT auto-recover, does NOT touch
  kno semantics, does NOT diagnose the upstream cause.

Approve and advance.
